title: Eyrythalia dichotoma
taxonomy: Eyrythalia dichotoma is a species of flowering plant in the family Loranthaceae. It is native to Western Australia. The classification of this plant includes its kingdom as Plantae, and its phylum as Angiospermophyta. Further classification places it in the class Magnoliopsida and the order Santalales. Additionally, it is commonly known to belong to the genus Eyrythalia.
